texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: FACT SHEET
texts.text: FACT SHEET

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Situated in the heart of the iconic Maasai Mara, just 2.5 km from Oloolaimutia Gate, offering swift access into the Maasai Mara National Reserve-maximize your time on safari rather than on the road.
texts.text: Situated in the heart of the iconic Maasai Mara, just 2.5 km from Oloolaimutia Gate, offering swift access into the Maasai Mara National Reserve-maximize your time on safari rather than on the road.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Experience
texts.text: Experience

texts.label: text
texts.orig: An intimate safari retreat combining untamed nature with timeless comfort, expertly woven with local Maasai culture and hospitality.
texts.text: An intimate safari retreat combining untamed nature with timeless comfort, expertly woven with local Maasai culture and hospitality.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: ACCOMMODATIONS
texts.text: ACCOMMODATIONS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Each tent is strategically positioned amid acacia-dotted landscapes for sweeping views of sunrises and sunsets. Guests enjoy private verandas right from their canvas tents, each equipped with en-suite bathrooms and plush, cozy beds.
texts.text: Each tent is strategically positioned amid acacia-dotted landscapes for sweeping views of sunrises and sunsets. Guests enjoy private verandas right from their canvas tents, each equipped with en-suite bathrooms and plush, cozy beds.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Accommodation Options Include:
texts.text: Accommodation Options Include:

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Standard Tents
texts.text: Standard Tents

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * No. Of Tents : 2
texts.text: No. Of Tents : 2

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * Size: 11.4 m²
texts.text: Size: 11.4 m²

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: * Features: Cozy and comfortable, Standard Tents offer an authentic safari feel with canvas walls, en-suite bathrooms, and private verandas overlooking the wilderness.
texts.text: Features: Cozy and comfortable, Standard Tents offer an authentic safari feel with canvas walls, en-suite bathrooms, and private verandas overlooking the wilderness.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: ACTIVITIES
texts.text: ACTIVITIES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Kipekee offers a dynamic range of safari adventures and cultural experiences:
texts.text: Kipekee offers a dynamic range of safari adventures and cultural experiences:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Game  Drives -  Private  guided  excursions  tailored  to  your  interests,  whether  tracking  the  Big  Five  or witnessing the wildebeest migration.
texts.text: Game  Drives -  Private  guided  excursions  tailored  to  your  interests,  whether  tracking  the  Big  Five  or witnessing the wildebeest migration.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Maasai Boma Visit - Engage with Maasai tradition through beadwork, dance, and visits to a traditional village.
texts.text: Maasai Boma Visit - Engage with Maasai tradition through beadwork, dance, and visits to a traditional village.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Bonfire  Evenings -  Gather  under  the  stars  around  a  glowing  campfire  enjoying  drinks,  snacks,  Maasai stories, and performances.
texts.text: Bonfire  Evenings -  Gather  under  the  stars  around  a  glowing  campfire  enjoying  drinks,  snacks,  Maasai stories, and performances.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Bush Breakfast & Dinner - Delight in serene meals surrounded by nature-sunrise breakfasts or romantically lit dinners in the bush.
texts.text: Bush Breakfast & Dinner - Delight in serene meals surrounded by nature-sunrise breakfasts or romantically lit dinners in the bush.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Sundowner - Sip your drink against the backdrop of an African sunset, with light bites in a classic safari tradition.
texts.text: Sundowner - Sip your drink against the backdrop of an African sunset, with light bites in a classic safari tradition.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Hot Air Balloon Safari - Drift over the Mara at dawn, then enjoy a champagne breakfast in the bush-an iconic, unforgettable experience.
texts.text: Hot Air Balloon Safari - Drift over the Mara at dawn, then enjoy a champagne breakfast in the bush-an iconic, unforgettable experience.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Walking Safari - Explore the Mara on foot with expert guides who illuminate the smaller wonders of the bush: tracks, flora, insects, and more.
texts.text: Walking Safari - Explore the Mara on foot with expert guides who illuminate the smaller wonders of the bush: tracks, flora, insects, and more.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: AMENITIES
texts.text: AMENITIES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Combines modern comforts with the charm of wilderness living:
texts.text: Combines modern comforts with the charm of wilderness living:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Cozy Beds & Modern Tents - Well-appointed tents or permanent structures with mosquito nets and private verandas.
texts.text: Cozy Beds & Modern Tents - Well-appointed tents or permanent structures with mosquito nets and private verandas.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Hot Showers & Flush Toilets - Refreshing facilities for a truly comfortable safari end to your day.
texts.text: Hot Showers & Flush Toilets - Refreshing facilities for a truly comfortable safari end to your day.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Bonfire Area - A dedicated spot for evening stories, Maasai performances, and camaraderie under the stars.
texts.text: Bonfire Area - A dedicated spot for evening stories, Maasai performances, and camaraderie under the stars.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Laundry Service - Convenient same-day laundry to keep you fresh during your stay.)
texts.text: Laundry Service - Convenient same-day laundry to keep you fresh during your stay.)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Fast Internet Connectivity - Stay connected even in the wild, thanks to reliable high-speed internet across the camp.
texts.text: Fast Internet Connectivity - Stay connected even in the wild, thanks to reliable high-speed internet across the camp.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Solar & Generator Power - Electricity is provided for lighting, charging, and heating water during specific hours.
texts.text: Solar & Generator Power - Electricity is provided for lighting, charging, and heating water during specific hours.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: ADDITIONAL HIGHLIGHTS
texts.text: ADDITIONAL HIGHLIGHTS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Signature Experiences: Whether it's a bush dinner, sundowner, or balloon safari, each experience is crafted for lasting memories.
texts.text: Signature Experiences: Whether it's a bush dinner, sundowner, or balloon safari, each experience is crafted for lasting memories.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Cultural Immersion: Activities centered on Maasai customs and stories enrich your safari with authentic local connection.
texts.text: Cultural Immersion: Activities centered on Maasai customs and stories enrich your safari with authentic local connection.

texts.orig: * Features: Spacious and elegantly furnished, Deluxe Tents combine luxury with adventure. They feature king or twin beds, stylish interiors, enhanced bathroom facilities, and larger verandas, perfect for guests who want added comfort after a day of exploring.
texts.text: Features: Spacious and elegantly furnished, Deluxe Tents combine luxury with adventure. They feature king or twin beds, stylish interiors, enhanced bathroom facilities, and larger verandas, perfect for guests who want added comfort after a day of exploring.
